name: playwright-automation-framework
description: Playwright + TypeScript test automation framework with Allure reporting

scripts.test: npm run clean:logs && npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test
scripts.test:headed: npm run clean:logs && npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.clean:logs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='./logs/test-run.log'; fs.existsSync(p) && fs.writeFileSync(p,''); console.log('Logs cleared.');"
scripts.clean:allure: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='./allure-results'; fs.existsSync(p) && fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Allure results cleared.');"
scripts.report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
